decisions.question: How should the daemon track that a coordinator session is active and eligible to receive questions — auto-registration on first MCP call, explicit pre-registration via CLI, or lazy registration on first await/check-messages call?
decisions.chosen: Lazy registration on first niwa_await_task or niwa_check_messages call

decisions.question: How should a question's arrival interrupt a coordinator currently blocking on niwa_await_task — extend the existing awaitWaiters channel with a new question event kind, add a separate interrupt channel, or convert to polling?
decisions.chosen: Separate questionWaiters channel per awaiting coordinator (role-keyed)
